introSection:
Sky Rider is a steel suspended spinning single rail roller coaster located at Skyline Park in Bad Wörishofen, Bavaria, Germany.

It is the only GyroFlyer roller coaster from Caripro, and has suspended cars which also spin. Each car has four seats, arranged in a circle facing inwards.
fullText:
Sky Rider is a steel suspended spinning single rail roller coaster located at Skyline Park in Bad Wörishofen, Bavaria, Germany.

It is the only GyroFlyer roller coaster from Caripro, and has suspended cars which also spin. Each car has four seats, arranged in a circle facing inwards.
